name: vibe-healer
description: Beginner-friendly Codex plugin that diagnoses local run issues, terminal errors, deployment failures, API key exposure, Git savepoints, and screenshot UI problems.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose beginner project problems and give one safe next step.
interface.longDescription: Vibe Healer helps beginners recover when a vibe-coded project will not run, throws errors, fails deployment, risks leaking API keys, needs a Git savepoint, or has visible UI problems. It favors diagnosis, plain language, safety, and verification over aggressive auto-fixing.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Vibe Healer to diagnose this project and give me the safest next step.
